Professional Fine Art & Contemporary painting courses in your private environment in Basel and Basel Area

Profineart Studio Basel

The Mentorship

Mastery of Fine Art

A private educational project providing specialized mentorship that combines historical tradition with contemporary artistic standards. All instruction is delivered in English. This mobile project brings professional training directly to your personal studio to ensure learning is integrated into your own creative setting.

The Curriculum

Focus on mastering the visual language of art through the chemistry of materials, historical accuracy, and the transition from classical underpainting to modern textures. The training covers the complexities of form and conceptual expression.

Professional Standards

BackgroundBuilt on significant academic achievement and a wealth of museum-level experience.

SpecializationRare technical depth in ancient media, such as Byzantine Iconography, alongside contemporary figurative painting.

Founder & Instructor

Ilya Medvedev →Artist and educator with an MFA from Bezalel Academy. Creator of the academy's methodology and digital platform, with a practice spanning 1,000+ professional works.

Masterclass

Oil Painting Process by the Mentor

Course Booking

Learn & Book

Byzantine Iconography Course

Beginners & Advanced
Student Space
Flexible Date
In-Person

Unlock the ancient secrets of sacred painting through exclusive, live individual sessions with a focus on historical techniques and mastery of Egg Tempera.

Learn & Book

Oil Painting Course

Beginners & Advanced
Student Space
Flexible Date
In-Person

Master the world’s most versatile and prestigious medium. From classical underpainting to modern textures, build a professional foundation in oil painting mastery.

Learn & Book

Aquarelle Course

Beginners & Advanced
Student Space
Flexible Date
In-Person

Master the delicate balance of water and light. From precise photographic-based linear drawing to advanced glazing, develop professional skills in the sophisticated medium of Aquarelle.

Learn & Book

Academic Drawing Course

Beginners & Advanced
Student Space
Flexible Date
In-Person

Master the language of line, light, and shadow. Build a powerful 'eye-brain-hand' connection through freehand techniques and classical anatomical study.

Learn & Book

Stone Painting Course

Beginners & Advanced
Student Space
Flexible Date
In-Person

Master the ancient and modern art of painting on stone. From prehistoric petroglyphs to contemporary fine art, learn to transform raw geological forms into eternal masterpieces.

Learn & Book

Contemporary Painting Course

Beginners & Advanced
Student Space
Flexible Date
In-Person

Master the fusion of Old Master discipline and contemporary vision. Learn to create high-level art that balances technical perfection with raw, conceptual power.

Click For More→

How It Works

1

Choose Course

Pick your preferred fine art subject from the catalog.

→
2

Book & Pay

Select format, amount, date, time, and your studio address.

→
3

Contact

Instructor will contact you to advise on session preparation.

→
4

Studio Session

Instructor travels to your studio at the booked day and time.

Trust

"I quickly realized I was in the right hands—a patient, attentive, and kind teacher with a rare ability to explain complex principles simply and clearly without pressure."

Dr. Dikla Arad|Board Eligible Veterinary Ophthalmologist

Reviews

Dr.Dikla Arad

★★★★★

I arrived about two years ago with almost zero experience and many fears. I quickly realized I was in the right hands. You are a patient, attentive, and kind teacher, with a rare ability to explain complex principles simply and clearly without pressure. You knew exactly when to guide, when to correct, and when to let me experiment. I especially appreciated your insistence that I do everything myself—particularly the difficult corrections—so that in the end, the painting is entirely 'mine,' giving me a huge sense of pride. This was an empowering experience both artistically and personally. I previously studied with different teachers, but your teaching was honest, enriching, and filled with true faith in art. You ensured we knew other artists and always brought examples from the masters to support your instructions. Thank you for the journey and the belief in me.

Dr.Devorah Schwartz-Arad

★★★★★

Lessons with you were an enriching experience, combining rigorous step-by-step learning without compromising on quality, while maintaining a sense of perfection and correct methodology. We started from the basics—preparing the canvas, measuring and understanding proportions, and acrylic underpainting—leading up to the highlight: oil painting. I am currently working on portraits of my family members from photos. You have definitely given me a solid foundation for my work, and I hope the results you see do not disappoint you.

Samantha Levitt

★★★★★
via Apprentus

My course with Ilya was great. Ilya was friendly, very knowledgeable, encouraging and totally adaptable to my needs and goals. It was fun to plan long-term projects with him and discuss styles and art history. If you are looking for a teacher who is both experienced, knowledgeable and relaxed, I highly recommend Ilya!

Alona Rechson

★★★★★

I met Ilya through the world of visual arts. First and foremost, he’s an incredible artist, a fascinating and controversial figure, and truly one of the funniest people I’ve ever known! He was also my tattoo artist; he helped me break into the industry, mentored me, and gave me the courage to get started. Today, I am the proud owner of my own tattoo business ❤️

Service Area

A mobile educational project providing high-level fine art education within your own environment. The learning process is fully integrated into your personal creative setting through direct travel to your studio space.

Switzerland

CH — Basel & Region

Full mobile service within Basel-Stadt, Basel-Landschaft, and a 21km operational radius.

Germany / France

DE / FR — Border Regions

Coverage across regional border towns and the immediate Alsace and Southern Baden areas.

International

Global — Special Request

Available for travel to major Swiss hubs, European cultural centers, and international metropolitan areas for specialized projects.
